subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken unto the call of this Husayn once again, and know thou that verily He hath sacrificed His spirit and His body [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین اسمع ندآء هذا الحسین مره اخری ثم اعلم بانه انفق روحه و جسده و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @consolation and comfort
